match.userMessage:
Macro product photography of a lipstick tube half-buried in damp sand on the shoreline at Bondi Beach during dusk, receding waves leaving smooth trails across the foreground sand with the ocean horizon softly visible in the background, captured using direct on-camera flash that delivers a sharp punch of light across the coral cap, shallow depth of field isolating the textures of wet sand and glossy product surface against a gently blurred coastal setting, bright natural golden-hour glow mixed with the flash for immediate tactile energy, eye-level tight framing focused on the product resting in the sand, modern social-first editorial style with crisp true-to-life color and clean contrast

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Golden light beach with promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
